title: Barbapapa Around the World
titleNative: バーバパパ　世界をまわる
synopsis: "Barbapapa around the world", is a fun-filled collection of 5-minute animated cartoons for preschool children. Barbapapa and his family return to TV for the first time in 25 years with 50 completely new and original episodes. Each episode travels to far-off lands where the Barbapapa family learns about plants, birds, reptiles or mammals in their natural Habitat. The Barbapapa family not only has fun playing with and imitating rare animals but it also helps the creatures when they fall into life-threatening situations. Join the Barbapapa Family as it travels to New Guinea, The Amazon, Patagonia and all over the world discovering the humor, danger and excitement of life. (Source: barbapapa.fr)

tags.name: Foreign

title: YAT Anshin! Uchuu Ryokou 2
titleNative: ＹＡＴ　安心！宇宙旅行 2
synopsis: The space travelling company, YAT, is thrown into the unknown realms of the outer space. At the same time, the group encounters the psychic, Maron, and scientist, Note. Subsequently, the two of them are attacked by the evil monarch, Ganon. Note was captured and taken away after suffering an attack from one of Ganon's followers, Baras. In order to rescue Note, the group had to use the instantenoeous portable machine which Note invented so as to travel to Ganon's planet. However, no one knows where the planet is... (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Space
tags.description: Partly or completely set in outer space.

title: Qin Shi Mingyue: Tian Xing Jiu Ge
titleRomaji: Qin Shi Mingyue: Tian Xing Jiu Ge
titleNative: 秦时明月 姐妹篇：天行九歌
synonyms: Qin's Moon: Nine Songs of the Moving Heavens
The Legend of Qin: Nine Songs of the Sky
synopsis: Facing the threat of the Qin State, danger seems to lurk within the Han State, which is known as the weakest out of the Seven States. Unknown to the Han Emperor, that very threat is the Great General of Han, Ji Wuye. Working under the Great General are the Four Fearful Warriors of Nightfall. Each four specialized in military, finance, politics, and espionage. In hopes of creating a new Han State, Quicksand was formed by Han Fei, the ninth prince of the Han. With Wei Zhuang, Zhang Liang, Zinü, and Nong Yu, they support the Prince in realizing the goal of Quicksand while being drawn into a whirlpool of power named “world”. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Wo Jian Qile Yi Di Shuxing
titleRomaji: Wo Jian Qile Yi Di Shuxing
titleNative: 我捡起了一地属性
synopsis: Feng Xia, a completely hardworking game player, travels through time and space. With his power, attributes, and strategies learned from the games he played before, he can beat his enemies and get their Light Masses of Attributes. Besides, he also meets all kinds of beauties along his way... His enemies laugh: "My martial arts are invincible!" Feng Xia just beats them and absorbs their Light Masses. "Indeed. But sorry, it's my martial arts now!" (Source: WeComics)

Water has become the most valueable thing on the world. Whoever can control water will rule over the world. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: The Journey Home
titleNative: スペースバグ
synopsis: This story is about Mick, a sleeping chironomid. Insects are taken up into space for use in experiments by humans. An epic space adventure of Mick and his friends on their journey back home to Earth. The development plans and experiments are aborted by humans for no known reason, the organisms are left behind in the space station with limited resources. Going over hurdles and fighting through challenges, together, they travel across planets and gain new comrades, heading for Earth. As their journey progresses, the mystery behind the human’s abandonment unravels.

titleNative: 龙蛇演义
synopsis: Under the guidance of National Martial Arts Master, Tang Zichen, a weak but righteous youth starts his traditional martial arts journey. Check out how he becomes invincible and goes beyond his limits time and time again. Experience how martial artists stop conflicts with martial arts, use virtue to subdue their opponents and how they make traditional martial arts popular again while promoting righteousness. (Source: bilibili, YouTube)

title: DINOZAURS : THE SERIES
titleNative: だいのぞーずざしりーず
synopsis: It is explained in the story that it has been 1,000,000 years since the Dino Knights had last defeated the Dragozaurs. The Dragozaurs have returned, a boy named Kaito has reawakened them. The battle between the Dino Knights and the Dragozaurs begins once again as the Dino Knights prevent the Dragozaurs from stealing Earth's life force. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Uchuu Senkan Yamato Movie (Provisional Title)
titleNative: 宇宙戦艦ヤマト（仮）
synopsis: At the 50th anniversary screening attended by Hideaki Anno, Yutaka Izubuchi and Ryuusuke Hikawa, it was announced that Studio Khara was granted rights to produce a new anime movie based on Space Battleship Yamato starting in 2025. Anno revealed that his studio acquired rights for the franchise and the soundtrack and that he is now able to create a new work. Note: Title and relations are provisional and subject to change.

title: Xin Yichang Shengwu Jianwen Lu: Xu
titleRomaji: Xin Yichang Shengwu Jianwen Lu: Xu
titleNative: 新·异常生物见闻录：序
synonyms: The new chronicles of extraordinary Beings: Preface
synopsis: Hao Ren was a typical young man from a small city who was barely making ends meet while living in an old house. However, via a strange turn of events, he becomes a "universe police officer." A problem is developing in his domain, the Dream Plane Universe, as he struggles to oversee a home inhabited by strange, non-human residents that his enigmatic superiors have assigned him. As he investigates further, Hao Ren discovers a link between the remnants of a vanished civilization in the Dream Plane and the strange species on Earth. Hao Ren quickly learns that slacking off is no longer an option when long-buried horrors, fallen deities, and ancient cataclysms reappear.
